title: Tournament Backend: LeakFinder + TiltAnalyzer + Decision EV Adaptados
plan: Decouple LeakFinder from CashAnalyzer: remove CashAnalyzer import/type hint, accept any analyzer via duck typing (Protocol or no type constraint), ensure all attribute accesses (_healthy_ranges, _warning_ranges, etc.) work with TournamentAnalyzer
Update LeakFinder._compare_periods() to check analyzer.game_type and call get_tournament_daily_stats() when game_type == 'tournament' instead of get_cash_daily_stats()
Add TournamentAnalyzer.get_leak_analysis() that instantiates LeakFinder(self, self.repo, self.year) and returns health_score, top5 leaks, study_spots, period_comparison
Adapt TiltAnalyzer to support tournament pseudo-sessions: group tournament hands by tournament_id, create pseudo-session objects with start/end times derived from hand timestamps

Add TournamentAnalyzer.get_tilt_analysis() that creates pseudo-sessions from tournament_id groupings and delegates to TiltAnalyzer, returning session_tilt, hourly, duration, post_bad_beat, diagnostics
Extract shared logic from EVAnalyzer.get_decision_ev_analysis() into _compute_decision_ev(actions, hands) private method
Add EVAnalyzer.get_tournament_decision_ev_analysis() that calls get_tournament_hands() and get_tournament_all_actions(), then delegates to _compute_decision_ev()
Add/update tests for LeakFinder duck typing, tournament tilt pseudo-sessions, tournament decision EV, and session leak summary
Run quality gates: typecheck, lint, tests, build
